name: HGI IoT Data Collection Terminal
desc: IoT data collection terminal for pipeline temperature/pressure monitoring. 4G/LoRa/M-Bus/RS485 uplink, IP67/IP68, 4-channel temp + 2-channel pressure, 6-year battery.
overview: The HGI IoT Data Collection Terminal is a high-performance wireless IoT device for collecting, storing and uploading temperature and pressure data from pipeline sensors. Supports multiple sensor types and protocols (M-Bus, RS485, LoRa, 4G). Used in district heating, water supply, gas pipelines and agricultural monitoring. Battery life up to 6 years.
features: High accuracy: temperature ±0.3°C, pressure ±0.5% FS (±0.25% FS optional) — pipeline monitoring without dedicated instruments
Surface-mount temperature sensor: installs on pipe exterior — no cutting, no welding, no process interruption
Battery-powered wireless version: standby <2.5 µA, battery life >6 years; no communication cable required
Wide environmental adaptability: high/low temperature, corrosion, HVAC, agriculture, underground pipelines
Flexible communication: M-Bus / RS485 / 4G / LoRa to suit any data system
IP67 / IP68 — outdoor, underground and submersion-rated
